---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for devdata-practice
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Varnasr
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem or workflow this feature would address. How would this help your research or teaching?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or examples here (e.g., links to papers, existing datasets, similar tools).
